rationale: The "fail" hook concept is broadly transferable in hyper-casual UA, but this specific archetype is anchored to a Bus Jam / parking puzzle context — the visuals (top-down vehicle grid, primary red/green/blue palette) and the tap-to-route mechanic clash hard with Crazy Kick's swipe-based, third-person stickman soccer loop and sunny yellow/sky-blue palette. We'd have to rebuild the creative from scratch (swap to a missed shot or own-goal fail, restyle to pitch/stickman), at which point we're only borrowing the "WHY IS THIS LEVEL SO HARD" overlay pattern. Recommend testing the fail-bait copy formula on a custom soccer-fail shoot, but do not adapt this asset directly.
